summary: This is a brief promotional announcement for Stacks Project hoodies being sold to support a mathematical research initiative. The post directs readers to sign up by June 16th to receive hoodies in time for the Stacks Project Workshop in Michigan. It's a community-building effort for mathematicians interested in algebraic geometry.
key_points: Stacks Project hoodies are available for purchase with a June 16th deadline
The hoodies tie into the Stacks Project Workshop happening in Michigan in late July
The initiative is a collaborative effort with Wei Ho and Pieter Belmans
key_insight: A lighthearted call to action for the mathematical community to show support for the Stacks Project through merchandise.
